description_long: This is a cylindrical wooden barrel with a rustic, weathered appearance, featuring prominent horizontal metal bands reinforcing the top, middle, and bottom. The wood staves are vertically aligned and display a natural grain pattern, giving the barrel an aged look. On one side, there is a large yellow and black radiation warning symbol, while another side displays a red diamond flammable warning sign, indicating hazardous contents. The metal bands are slightly corroded, adding to the sense of age and exposure to the elements. The top of the barrel is flat and constructed from the same wooden planks as the sides, with no visible openings or spouts. The overall design suggests it is used for storing or transporting dangerous materials in an urban or industrial setting.
description: A weathered wooden barrel reinforced with metal bands, featuring radiation and flammable hazard warning symbols. Its rustic appearance and warning labels suggest it stores dangerous materials.
description_view_0: The barrel is seen with a partial view of the radiation warning symbol and the wood grain texture, with metal bands visible at the top and bottom.
description_view_1: This view highlights the red diamond flammable warning symbol on the wooden surface, with the metal bands and wood grain clearly visible.
description_view_2: The barrel is shown from a side angle with no visible warning symbols, emphasizing the wood texture and metal banding.
description_view_3: The full radiation warning symbol is prominently displayed, with the wood and metal banding details visible.
attribute_banding_or_reinforcement: metal hoops at top, middle, and bottom
attribute_labeling_or_markings: radiation warning symbol, flammable warning symbol
